required_tokens.TAGLINE: Short tagline e.g. 'Sparkling Homes in Cochrane Since 2019'
required_tokens.SERVICE_AREA_TEXT: Sentence form e.g. 'Serving Cochrane, Airdrie, and northwest Calgary'
required_tokens.PRIMARY_COLOR: Hex — softer brand color (teal, sky blue, lavender, mint suggested)
required_tokens.ACCENT_COLOR: CTA hex — friendly (coral, pink, sunny yellow, sage suggested)
required_tokens.SOFT_BG_COLOR: Hex — very pale tint used for soft section backgrounds e.g. '#f0fdfa'
required_tokens.HERO_IMAGE_URL: Path or absolute URL to bright cleaning hero photo
required_tokens.SERVICE_TYPES_HTML: HTML chunk: 4 .type-card blocks (Residential / Commercial / Move-in-Out / Recurring) each with .type-icon, h3, .type-sub, ul.type-list of 4-5 checkmark items
required_tokens.WHY_HTML: HTML chunk: 4 .why-item blocks each with .why-icon (svg), h3, p
required_tokens.PRICING_SECTION_HTML: Optional full <section> HTML chunk for pricing tiers — pass empty string '' to skip. If provided, use class='section' with pricing-grid containing pricing-card blocks.
